allow:
Bash(cat > D:/cafe-system/frontend/.env.local << 'EOF'
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001
EOF
mkdir -p D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/lib
mkdir -p D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/components/ui
mkdir -p D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/components/admin
mkdir -p "D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/app/\(admin\)/menu"
mkdir -p "D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/app/\(admin\)/orders"
mkdir -p "D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/app/\(admin\)/dashboard")

Bash(ls D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/app/\\\(admin\\\)/ 2>/dev/null || echo "empty"
ls D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/lib/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no lib"
ls D:/cafe-system/frontend/src/components/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no components")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/orders \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"items": [{"menuItemId": "69b1c35f2100d513e8d9280e", "quantity": 2}]}' | python -m json.tool)

Bash(cd D:/cafe-system && gh pr create --title "feat: Add Next.js 14 admin dashboard frontend" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Scaffold Next.js 14 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS frontend
- Dark design system \(bg `#0c0c10`, gold `#c9a96e`, Georgia serif\) matching spec
- Full admin CRUD for menu items, order history, and dashboard stats

## Changes
- `lib/types.ts` + `lib/api.ts` — all TypeScript interfaces and centralized fetch functions
- UI components: `CategoryBadge`, `StatCard`, `Toast`, `TabBar`
- Admin components: `Sidebar`, `MenuTable`, `MenuFormModal`, `DeleteConfirmModal`, `OrderTable`
- Pages: `/menu` \(full CRUD\), `/orders` \(history + date filter\), `/dashboard` \(stats + recent orders\)
- Root `/` redirects to `/menu`

## Test plan
- [ ] Backend running on port 3001 \(`npm run start:dev`\)
- [ ] Frontend running on port 3000 \(`npm run dev`\)
- [ ] `/menu` — add, edit, delete menu items
- [ ] `/orders` — view order history, filter by today/this week
- [ ] `/dashboard` — verify total orders, revenue, avg order value, recent orders table

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/orders \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"items": [{"menuItemId": "69b2aafa9c2b1a6674d96197", "quantity": 1}]}' | python -m json.tool)
Bash(cmd //c "FOR /F \\"tokens=5\\" %P IN \('netstat -ano ^| findstr :3000'\) DO taskkill /PID %P /F" 2>/dev/null; echo "done")
Bash(cd D:/cafe-system && cat backend/package.json | python -m json.tool)
Bash(cd D:/cafe-system && cat frontend/package.json | python -m json.tool)

Bash(cd D:/cafe-system/backend && npm test -- --verbose --forceExit --json --outputFile=test-results.json 2>&1; cat test-results.json | python -m json.tool | python -c "
import json,sys
data=json.load\(open\('test-results.json'\)\)
for suite in data['testResults']:
    print\(suite['testFilePath'].split\('src/'\)[-1]\)
    for t in suite['testResults']:
        status = '✓' if t['status']=='passed' else '✗'
        print\(f'  {status} {t[\\"fullName\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Suites: {data[\\"numPassedTestSuites\\"]}/{data[\\"numTotalTestSuites\\"]} passed'\)
print\(f'Tests:  {data[\\"numPassedTests\\"]}/{data[\\"numTotalTests\\"]} passed'\)
print\(f'Time:   {data[\\"testResults\\"][0][\\"perfStats\\"][\\"runtime\\"]/1000:.2f}s'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json
data=json.load\(open\('D:/cafe-system/backend/test-results.json'\)\)
for suite in data['testResults']:
    path = suite['testFilePath'].replace\('\\\\\\\\','/'\).split\('backend/'\)[-1]
    print\(f'\\n{path}'\)
    for t in suite['testResults']:
        status = '✓' if t['status']=='passed' else '✗'
        print\(f'  {status} {t[\\"fullName\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Suites: {data[\\"numPassedTestSuites\\"]}/{data[\\"numTotalTestSuites\\"]} passed'\)
print\(f'Tests:  {data[\\"numPassedTests\\"]}/{data[\\"numTotalTests\\"]} passed'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json
data=json.load\(open\('D:/cafe-system/backend/test-results.json'\)\)
for suite in data['testResults']:
    path = suite['testFilePath'].replace\(chr\(92\),'/'\).split\('backend/'\)[-1]
    print\(\)
    print\(path\)
    for t in suite['testResults']:
        s = 'PASS' if t['status']=='passed' else 'FAIL'
        print\('  ['+s+'] '+t['fullName']\)
print\(\)
print\('Suites: '+str\(data['numPassedTestSuites']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTestSuites']\)+' passed'\)
print\('Tests:  '+str\(data['numPassedTests']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTests']\)+' passed'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json
data=json.load\(open\('D:/cafe-system/backend/test-results.json'\)\)
for suite in data['testResults']:
    name = suite['name'].replace\(chr\(92\),'/'\).split\('backend/'\)[-1]
    print\(\)
    print\(name\)
    for t in suite['assertionResults']:
        s = 'PASS' if t['status']=='passed' else 'FAIL'
        print\('  ['+s+'] '+t['fullName']\)
print\(\)
print\('Suites: '+str\(data['numPassedTestSuites']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTestSuites']\)+' passed'\)
print\('Tests:  '+str\(data['numPassedTests']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTests']\)+' passed'\)
print\('Time:   '+str\(round\(data['testResults'][0]['endTime']-data['testResults'][0]['startTime']\)\)+'ms'\)
")

Bash(cd D:/cafe-system/backend && npm run test:e2e -- --verbose --json --outputFile=test-e2e-results.json 2>&1; python -c "
import json
data=json.load\(open\('test-e2e-results.json'\)\)
for suite in data['testResults']:
    name = suite['name'].replace\(chr\(92\),'/'\).split\('backend/'\)[-1]
    print\(\)
    print\(name\)
    for t in suite['assertionResults']:
        s = 'PASS' if t['status']=='passed' else 'FAIL'
        print\('  ['+s+'] '+t['fullName']\)
print\(\)
print\('Suites: '+str\(data['numPassedTestSuites']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTestSuites']\)+' passed'\)
print\('Tests:  '+str\(data['numPassedTests']\)+'/'+str\(data['numTotalTests']\)+' passed'\)
")
